LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENTS WHITE PACIFIC SECURITIES INC. AND ROBERT ANGLE'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS UNDER CALIFORNIA CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 128.7 IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 4, 2015, AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE THE MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 AND MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE REPLY TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 29, 2015 AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/AJR

ORDER ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DANIEL GULAK'S AMENDED HEARING ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT IT MAKES CLEAR THE ENTIRE ARBITRATION AWARD: (1) WHITE PACIFIC IS LIABLE FOR $200,000.00; (2) ROBERT NELSON IS LIABLE FOR $50,000.00; (3) ITEMS ONE AND TWO ARE NOT AWARDED JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY; (4) PATRICK NELSON IS NOT LIABLE; (5) ROBERT NELSON'S REQUEST FOR EXPUNGEMENT OF HIS CRD RECORD IS DENIED; AND (6) ANY AND ALL RELIEF NOT SPECIFICALLY ADDRESSED IS DENIED. THIS COURT GRANTS TO PLAINTIFF $862 IN COSTS JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER : MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489 =302

Motion For Sanctions Under California Code Of Civil Procedure 128.7
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. VAL D. HORNSTEIN OF THE HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 1-415-454-1490 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. CHRISTOPHER MADER OF THE BALDWIN LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-310-363-2031 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; RESPONDENTS WHITE PACIFIC SECURITIES INC. and ROBERT ANGLE'S Motion For Sanctions Under California Code Of Civil Procedure 128.7 is taken under submission. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

Motion For Sanctions Under California Code Of Civil Procedure 128.7
Off Calendar Sep-29-2015 Continued To Nov-04-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
RESPONDENTS WHITE PACIFIC SECURITIES INC. AND ROBERT ANGLE'S Motion For Sanctions Under California Code Of Civil Procedure 128.7 is continued to November 4, 2015, to give the moving and opposing parties Continued to the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposing papers to Department 302 and moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the reply to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 29, 2015 at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ajr

Notice Of Hearing On First Amended Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. VAL D. HORSNTEIN OF THE HORNSTEIN LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 1-415-454-1490 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. CHRISTOPHER MADER OF THE BALDWIN LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-310-363-2031 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court modified its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PETITIONER DANIEL GULAK'S Amended Hearing On First Amended Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is GRANTED on the condition that it makes clear the entire arbitration award: (1) White Pacific is liable for $200,000.00; (2) Robert Nelson is liable for $50,000.00; (3) Items one and two are not awarded jointly and severally; (4) Patrick Nelson is not liable; (5) Robert Nelson's request for expungement of his CRD record is denied; and (6) any and all relief not specifically addressed is denied. This court GRANTS to plaintiff $862 in costs jointly and severally. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302
